plan.title: QA Findings Remediation — Document Q&A Assistant

tasks.description: Fix verify_remediation.py inverted logic (CF-001) — Change 'if not missing' to 'if missing' at lines 24-27 to correctly report PASS/FAIL status
tasks.acceptance: verify_remediation.py reports FAIL when fixes are missing, PASS when all fixes applied

tasks.description: Replace Path.walk() with os.walk() in bundle_embedding_model.py (batch1-CF001) for Python 3.10/3.11 compatibility at line 66
tasks.acceptance: scripts/bundle_embedding_model.py uses os.walk() and works on Python 3.10, 3.11, 3.12+

tasks.description: Consolidate duplicate validate_url() functions (batch7-005) — Merge api_server.py:32-97 and llm_interface.py:36-104 into single shared implementation with consistent SSRF policy
tasks.acceptance: Single validate_url() function in shared module, both api_server and llm_interface import from it, all SSRF tests pass

tasks.description: Fix chunk_overlap=0 infinite loop in document_processor.py (batch2-F006) at lines 155-168, 229-236 — Add validation to reject chunk_overlap=0
tasks.acceptance: chunk_overlap=0 raises ValueError immediately, no infinite loop, tests verify rejection

tasks.description: Add authentication to API endpoints (batch2-F002) — Implement API key or token-based auth for all endpoints in api_server.py:590-733
tasks.acceptance: All API endpoints require valid authentication, unauthorized requests return 401, tests verify auth enforcement

tasks.description: Remove or implement streaming /ask endpoint documentation (CF-002) — Either implement streaming in api_server.py or remove from USAGE.md:788-809
tasks.acceptance: Documentation matches implementation — either streaming works or docs don't claim it exists

tasks.description: Wire RAG_MIN_SIMILARITY environment variable (CF-002) — Connect CONFIGURATION.md:43 to api_server.py:518 and engine_factory.py:193-204
tasks.acceptance: RAG_MIN_SIMILARITY env var is read and used in similarity threshold calculations, tests verify wiring

phases.name: P0 Critical Test Fixes — False Confidence

tasks.description: Replace mocked API endpoint tests with real RAG pipeline tests (batch4-CRITICAL-2) — Rewrite tests/test_api.py:45-63,79-101,136-153,168-188,212-225,251-260 to test actual engine behavior
tasks.acceptance: API tests use real RAG engine (not mocks), test actual query/response flow, all tests pass

tasks.description: Fix GGUF path wiring tests to test real code (batch4-CRITICAL-3) — Rewrite tests/test_gguf_path_wiring_final.py:11-120 to verify actual GGUF loading, not mock interface
tasks.acceptance: GGUF tests verify real model loading, not mock calls, tests pass with actual llama-cpp-python

tasks.description: Fix RAG engine tests to not mock all dependencies (batch4-CRITICAL-4) — Rewrite tests/test_rag_engine.py:139-226 to test real query behavior
tasks.acceptance: RAG engine tests use real dependencies (vector store, LLM), query returns actual results not canned data

tasks.description: Fix llama_cpp test skip logic (batch4-CRITICAL-1) — Ensure tests/test_llm_interface.py:230-235 properly handles missing llama_cpp with clear skip message
tasks.acceptance: Test clearly reports when llama_cpp not installed, doesn't silently pass, skip reason is descriptive

tasks.description: Fix version bump script regex (CF-001) — Update scripts/version_bump.py:13-17 to match actual README.md format or update README to have Version: field
tasks.acceptance: version_bump.py successfully finds and updates version in README.md

tasks.description: Fix build_installer.py hardcoded model mismatch (batch1-CF002) — Change Qwen3-1.7B to Qwen2.5-1.5B at line 135 to match README.md specification
tasks.acceptance: build_installer.py references Qwen2.5-1.5B consistently with README.md

tasks.description: Fix env var parsing for non-integer values (batch2-F010) — Add validation and error handling in engine_factory.py:193-204
tasks.acceptance: Non-integer env vars raise clear error messages, not silent failures

tasks.description: Fix api_server.py hardcoded embedding_model (batch7-014) — Use RAG_EMBEDDING_MODEL env var at line 524 instead of hardcoded value
tasks.acceptance: api_server.py reads embedding_model from RAG_EMBEDDING_MODEL env var, tests verify

tasks.description: Fix BM25 O(n²) rebuild performance issue (batch2-F007) — Optimize vector_store.py:109-117 to avoid full rebuild on every add_documents
tasks.acceptance: BM25 index updates incrementally, add_documents performance is O(n) not O(n²), tests verify performance

tasks.description: Fix BM25 index rebuild exception swallowing (batch2-F013) — Add proper error handling in vector_store.py:218-246
tasks.acceptance: BM25 rebuild exceptions are logged and propagated, not silently swallowed

tasks.description: Fix blocking filesystem check in engine_factory.py (batch3-F005) — Make line 217-218 non-blocking or async
tasks.acceptance: Filesystem check doesn't block event loop, uses async method or thread pool

tasks.description: Fix security scans || true in CI (batch1-CF013) — Remove '|| true' from .github/workflows/security.yml:28 so failures fail the build
tasks.acceptance: Security scan failures fail the CI build, not silently pass

tasks.description: Fix pytest continue-on-error in CI (batch1-CF014) — Remove continue-on-error: true from .github/workflows/test.yml:40
tasks.acceptance: Test failures fail the CI build, not silently continue

tasks.description: Fix workflow_dispatch input validation (batch1-CF003) — Add validation for inputs in .github/workflows/release.yml:34
tasks.acceptance: Workflow inputs are validated before use, invalid inputs fail fast with clear error

tasks.description: Fix subprocess.run to use sys.executable (batch1-CF010) — Change 'pip' to sys.executable -m pip in scripts/build_installer.py:52-63
tasks.acceptance: build_installer.py uses sys.executable -m pip for reliable Python environment execution

tasks.description: Fix CORS allow_origins hardcoding (batch7-015) — Make CORS origins configurable via env var in api_server.py:556-561
tasks.acceptance: CORS allow_origins reads from env var RAG_CORS_ORIGINS, defaults to ['*'] for development

phases.name: P1 High Priority — API Contract & Documentation

tasks.description: Fix /search response format mismatch (CF-003) — Align api_server.py:623-626 with USAGE.md:479 documentation or update docs
tasks.acceptance: /search endpoint returns format documented in USAGE.md, or docs updated to match actual format

tasks.description: Fix CORS allows all methods despite allow_origins (batch2-F008) — Restrict methods in api_server.py:554-565 to match documented API
tasks.acceptance: CORS only allows methods actually used by API (GET, POST), not all methods

tasks.description: Fix /stats endpoint information leakage (batch2-F009) — Remove sensitive system info from api_server.py:574-587
tasks.acceptance: /stats returns only non-sensitive metrics (uptime, request count), no system paths or internal details

tasks.description: Fix llm_interface.validate_url username-only URL issue (batch7-013) — Align with api_server.py rejection at lines 60-62
tasks.acceptance: Both validate_url implementations reject username-only URLs consistently

tasks.description: Fix bare except: pass in version_bump.py (batch1-CF009) — Replace with specific exception handling at line 44
tasks.acceptance: Specific exception types caught (FileNotFoundError, PermissionError), all others propagated

tasks.description: Fix ingest endpoint directory traversal via CWD (batch2-F003) — Validate paths in api_server.py:211-236,632-656
tasks.acceptance: Ingest endpoint rejects paths outside allowed directories, path traversal attempts blocked

tasks.description: Fix path traversal test bypassing validate_directory (batch4-HIGH-1) — Fix tests/test_api.py:190-197 to actually test validation
tasks.acceptance: Path traversal test properly triggers validate_directory, verifies rejection behavior

tasks.description: Fix vector store tests to check behavior not just types (batch4-HIGH-3) — Improve tests/test_vector_store.py:294-304,264-281,317-327
tasks.acceptance: Vector store tests verify actual behavior (search returns correct results), not just return types

tasks.description: Fix health check test hardcoded strings (batch4-HIGH-4) — Improve tests/test_api.py:29-37 to verify actual health status
tasks.acceptance: Health check test verifies actual system health indicators, not just hardcoded strings

tasks.description: Fix real TCP connection in test (batch4-HIGH-5) — Mock network calls in tests/test_llm_interface.py:302-305
tasks.acceptance: LLM interface tests mock network connections, don't make real TCP calls

tasks.description: Fix empty test with wrong import (CF-006) — Correct import in tests/test_phase1_adversarial.py:144-150,177-181
tasks.acceptance: Test imports correct function, validates actual behavior with assertions

tasks.description: Fix 4 tests with only pass or try/except/pass (CF-005) — Implement tests/test_phase1_adversarial.py:182-232 with actual assertions
tasks.acceptance: All 4 tests have meaningful assertions that verify expected behavior

tasks.description: Fix dummy assert True after loop (batch5-001) — Implement real assertion in tests/regression/test_defect_003_url_validation.py:130
tasks.acceptance: Test has meaningful assertion verifying URL validation behavior

tasks.description: Fix placeholder assert True (batch5-012) — Implement real assertion in tests/regression/test_defect_003_url_validation.py:150
tasks.acceptance: Test has meaningful assertion verifying expected behavior

tasks.description: Fix try/except/pass silently accepting bugs (batch5-014) — Add assertions to tests/test_phase1_adversarial.py:28-41
tasks.acceptance: Test verifies expected behavior with assertions, exceptions indicate test failure

tasks.description: Fix test creating own parser (batch4-HIGH-2) — Make tests/test_main_gguf_path.py:22-60 test real main.py parser
tasks.acceptance: Test uses actual main.py argument parser, not custom test parser

tasks.description: Fix Pydantic v2 deprecation (batch4-HIGH-6) — Replace .dict() with .model_dump() in tests/test_api.py:92,107,118,144,159
tasks.acceptance: All Pydantic model serialization uses .model_dump(), tests pass with Pydantic v2

tasks.description: Fix PyInstaller support claim (batch3-F003) — Either implement _MEIPASS support in app_paths.py:2-6,15 or remove claim
tasks.acceptance: PyInstaller support either works (detects _MEIPASS, uses correct paths) or docstring doesn't claim it

tasks.description: Fix build.py OpenVINO comment (batch3-F004) — Update comment at lines 62-64 to reflect GGUF usage
tasks.acceptance: build.py comments accurately describe GGUF model usage, not OpenVINO

tasks.description: Fix Inno Setup script placeholders (batch1-CF006) — Replace 'Your Company Name' and placeholder URLs in scripts/build_installer.py:156-201
tasks.acceptance: Inno Setup script has actual company name and URLs, no placeholder values

tasks.description: Fix performance token/sec claims (batch6-001) — Add empirical evidence or qualify claims in README.md:22,43,50,56
tasks.acceptance: Performance claims include measurement conditions or are marked as estimated/theoretical

tasks.description: Fix context_truncation documentation (batch6-004) — Align CONFIGURATION.md:545 with rag_engine.py:19 or make configurable
tasks.acceptance: context_truncation is either configurable via env var or docs match hardcoded value

tasks.description: Fix GUI chunk_size range mismatch (batch7-006) — Align app_gui.py:230 with api_server.py:429 and rag_engine.py:48
tasks.acceptance: GUI chunk_size range matches API and engine (100-10000 or consistent subset)

tasks.description: Fix GUI max_tokens range mismatch (batch7-007) — Align app_gui.py:244 with api_server.py:430
tasks.acceptance: GUI max_tokens range matches API (100-4000 or consistent subset)

tasks.description: Fix AFOMIS legacy branding (CF-004) — Update app_paths.py:15, CONFIGURATION.md:26,559 to 'Document Q&A Assistant'
tasks.acceptance: All references use 'Document Q&A Assistant', no AFOMIS legacy names

tasks.description: Fix build_installer Qwen3 reference (batch1-CF011) — Already covered in task 3.2, verify consistency
tasks.acceptance: All model references consistent (Qwen2.5-1.5B)

tasks.description: Fix deprecated GitHub Actions (batch1-CF007, batch1-CF008) — Update cache@v3→v4, codecov@v3→v4 in .github/workflows/test.yml
tasks.acceptance: All GitHub Actions use current versions (v4), no deprecation warnings

tasks.description: Fix version number staleness (batch6-008) — Update ARCHITECTURE.md:584-585, USAGE.md:897-898, app_gui.py:290
tasks.acceptance: All version numbers are current and consistent across docs and code

tasks.description: Fix unbound variable gui_content in verify_remediation.py (batch3-F002) — Initialize at line 278
tasks.acceptance: gui_content variable is always defined before use, no UnboundLocalError

tasks.description: Fix GUI message processor duplicate thread (batch2-F005) — Prevent double start in app_gui.py:512-514
tasks.acceptance: Message processor thread starts only once, duplicate start attempts are prevented

tasks.description: Fix version_bump.py relative paths (batch1-CF012) — Add path validation at lines 13,36
tasks.acceptance: Paths are validated to exist before use, clear error if files not found

tasks.description: Fix subprocess.run without capture_output (batch1-CF015) — Add capture_output to scripts/build.py:84
tasks.acceptance: subprocess output is captured and logged on failure, not lost

tasks.description: Fix BUILD_DIR containment substring match (batch1-CF018) — Use proper path comparison in scripts/build_installer.py:78
tasks.acceptance: BUILD_DIR containment uses path comparison (startswith with path normalization), not substring

tasks.description: Fix duplicate lazy import comments (batch3-F006) — Consolidate or differentiate comments in engine_factory.py:46-49,121-124,180-184
tasks.acceptance: Each lazy import has unique, accurate comment explaining why it's lazy

tasks.description: Fix LOCALAPPDATA caching (batch3-F007) — Cache result in app_paths.py:22 instead of calling on every invocation
tasks.acceptance: LOCALAPPDATA is cached after first call, subsequent calls use cached value

tasks.description: Fix PyInstaller log level WARN (batch3-F008) — Change to WARNING in scripts/build.py:20
tasks.acceptance: PyInstaller log level is valid (WARNING), no invalid log level warning

tasks.description: Add explanation for magic numbers (batch3-F009) — Document 50 tokens and 0.3 temp in query_transformer.py:26-28
tasks.acceptance: Magic numbers have inline comments explaining their purpose and origin

tasks.description: Improve RRF docstring (batch3-F010) — Explain formula in utils.py:3-14
tasks.acceptance: RRF docstring explains the reciprocal rank fusion formula with example

tasks.description: Add encoding to write_text (batch3-F011) — Specify utf-8 in build.py:126
tasks.acceptance: write_text calls specify encoding='utf-8', no platform-dependent default

tasks.description: Fix stop words inline recreation (batch3-F013) — Make module-level constant in query_transformer.py:41-50
tasks.acceptance: Stop words defined once at module level, not recreated every function call

tasks.description: Fix GUI embedding model init error recovery (batch2-F011) — Add try/except in app_gui.py:516-583
tasks.acceptance: GUI handles embedding init failures gracefully, shows error message to user

tasks.description: Add file size limit on directory ingestion (batch2-F012) — Check size in document_processor.py:274-289
tasks.acceptance: Directory ingestion rejects files exceeding size limit, configurable via env var

tasks.description: Remove dead import of create_engine (batch2-F014) — Clean up rag_engine.py:26-30
tasks.acceptance: Dead import removed, no import errors

tasks.description: Fix BM25 deletion startswith vs exact match (batch2-F015) — Use exact match in vector_store.py:560-565
tasks.acceptance: BM25 deletion uses exact document ID match, not startswith

tasks.description: Fix dead exception variable (batch2-F020) — Use or remove exception variable in api_server.py:437-442
tasks.acceptance: Exception variable is used (logged) or removed if not needed

tasks.description: Fix GITHUB_TOKEN explicit pass (batch1-CF004) — Remove unnecessary token from .github/workflows/release.yml:26
tasks.acceptance: GITHUB_TOKEN not passed explicitly (actions/checkout handles it automatically)

tasks.description: Fix Windows path literal in build.yml (batch1-CF005) — Make path cross-platform in .github/workflows/build.yml:43
tasks.acceptance: Path works on Windows, macOS, and Linux (uses path joining)

tasks.description: Fix Compress-Archive PowerShell-only (batch1-CF017) — Make cross-platform in .github/workflows/build.yml:47
tasks.acceptance: Archive creation works on all platforms (uses Python zipfile or similar)

tasks.description: Fix unescaped percent in app_paths.py docstring (batch3-F012) — Escape % at line 15
tasks.acceptance: Percent sign properly escaped in docstring, no syntax issues

tasks.description: Fix test assert True documenting IP classification (batch5-002) — Implement real test in tests/regression/test_defect_003_url_validation.py:270
tasks.acceptance: Test verifies IP classification behavior with real assertions

tasks.description: Run full test suite and verify all tests pass
tasks.acceptance: pytest runs with 0 failures, all new tests pass

tasks.description: Run security scan and verify no new vulnerabilities
tasks.acceptance: Security scan passes, no CRITICAL/HIGH findings introduced

tasks.description: Update CHANGELOG.md with all fixes
tasks.acceptance: CHANGELOG.md documents all 79 fixes by category

tasks.description: Update README.md if needed with any behavior changes
tasks.acceptance: README.md reflects any user-facing changes from fixes
